events.event_description: In the dbt Labs on dbt series, a behind-the-scenes look at how dbt Labs uses its own product and the technical decisions made in their own dbt project.

events.raw_text:
Thu, Jun 27, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM IST

dbt Labs office, Dublin

'dbt Labs on dbt' Meetup: Dublin

In the dbt Labs on dbt series, a behind-the-scenes look at how dbt Labs uses our own product, how dbt Labs thinks about the role of data, and the technical decisions made in their own dbt project.

Speaker: Ernesto Ongaro, Solutions Architect, dbt Labs.

talks.description: A behind-the-scenes look at how dbt Labs uses its own product internally, covering the role of data and technical decisions in their own dbt project.
talks.title: dbt Labs on dbt

additional_metadata.note: Part of the dbt Global Circuit Series.
